candidate_lesson.lesson_text: A rate-divergence SHORT that fires while HTF market structure is BULLISH and no CHOCH/BOS confirms the trade direction is a counter-structure macro bet that loses even with a valid FVG and liquidity sweep.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: Institutional order flow does not reverse on a single BSL sweep — when HTF structure is still bullish, the sweep is a stop-run inside continuation, not a distribution top. A macro rate-diff z of only -0.97 (sub-1.0 magnitude) lacks the conviction to overpower an intact bullish delivery, so the short is entered into the very liquidity institutions are using to continue upward. Structure must confirm (BOS/CHOCH in trade direction) before macro direction can be trusted.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if signal_direction != htf_structure_direction and not structure_shift_confirmed and abs(rate_diff_z) < 1.2: veto_trade()
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Removes counter-structure low-conviction macro entries; targets win-rate lift and drawdown reduction, supporting +0.02-0.03 Sharpe toward the v014 gap by cutting -1.0R losers.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: The single closed trade (USDJPY SHORT, R=-1.002) is the only sample: it combined a bullish-vs-macro-short structure conflict AND no CHOCH/BOS, and lost a full R.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_reasoning: The one decision log entry shows rate_diff_z=-0.968 (|z|<1.2), '✗ HTF bias: market structure BULLISH vs macro SHORT', and '✗ No structure shift (CHOCH/BOS) in trade direction' — three failing layers coincided with the -1.002R outcome; the two passing layers (FVG, BSL sweep) were insufficient.
candidate_lesson.reasoning_component_targeted: rate_differential_zscore (gated jointly with HTF-structure agreement and structure_shift flag)

reflection.system_health_note: System is effectively flat (0 trades in 7 days, regime UNKNOWN, forex NO_TRADE_TODAY) with only 1 closed trade to learn from — insufficient sample for any high-confidence lesson, so gate proposals should await 20+ trades before implementation.
